01 / About

Curiosity as a
methodology

Bridging Theory & Implementation

I am an MSc Computer Science candidate at the University of Limpopo, with a dual foundation in Mathematical Sciences and Computer Science. My work lives at the intersection of rigorous theory and practical AI engineering.

I'm defined by an unwavering dedication to excellence — from designing generative models for indoor positioning systems, to building real-time RAG pipelines and enterprise audit automation tools.

With 11 distinctions across undergraduate and Honours studies, I bring the same meticulous attention to every project — whether publishing research or shipping production ML systems.

📍 Soshanguve South, Gauteng, South Africa

02 / Research

Academic
portfolio

MSc Research · Active

A Generative & Adaptive Deep Learning Framework for WiFi Fingerprinting

GPS fails indoors, and manual WiFi signal mapping is prohibitively labour-intensive — up to 40+ hours per floor. This research engineers an end-to-end solution using Conditional GANs to synthesise high-quality signal data, paired with a Hybrid CNN-Transformer architecture that captures both local spatial features and global sequence dependencies.

The framework integrates LogNet, an interpretability layer using binary logic gates, to give black-box AI traceable explanations at the Access Point level — bridging the gap between synthetic data efficiency and model transparency.

Conditional GAN CNN-Transformer LogNet / XAI Indoor Positioning PyTorch
Honours Research · Completed

Early Prediction of High-Risk Pregnancies Using Machine Learning

Developed a clinical decision support system for maternal health using a stacked ensemble approach. Addressing severe class imbalance via SMOTE, the model combines the predictive strengths of XGBoost, LightGBM, and CatBoost into a robust, deployable health intelligence tool.

Designed for utility in low-resource clinical settings where specialist access is limited — empowering frontline healthcare workers with AI-assisted risk stratification.

98.01%
Overall Accuracy

Ensemble Models
XGBoost LightGBM CatBoost SMOTE Scikit-learn

04 / Projects

Technical
builds

🐄

Livestock Management Mobile App

A full-stack React Native / Supabase solution integrated with IoT hardware (ESP32) via Bluetooth Low Energy. Features an AI chat interface that dynamically queries SQL databases using Google Gemini APIs — bringing intelligence to agricultural management.

React NativeSupabaseESP32 / BLEGemini API
🛒

Service Marketplace Web Application

A modern marketplace platform built with React, Vite, and Supabase to connect small businesses with local users. Focused on clean UX, real-time data, and scalable backend architecture for community-driven commerce.

FinSight Analytics Prototype

An AI-driven financial analytics tool developed at Linkfields Innovations. Translates raw business and financial data into actionable insights through intelligent data pipelines, LLM-assisted report generation, and interactive dashboards.
